frictions.description: `mix run` attempted to start the app and conflicted with shared port 4000 while services were already running.
Direct ad-hoc pipeline repro using `mix run --no-start` and `Bropilot.init/1` failed because required app processes (Recipe.Registry) are not started in no-start mode.
frictions.resolution: Used existing passing pipeline persistence ExUnit tests plus direct pipeline_state file inspection for evidence.

summary: Tested 35 assertions: 32 passed, 3 failed, 0 blocked, 0 skipped. Failures: VAL-CLEAN-003, VAL-CLEAN-005, VAL-CROSS-044.
